data.message: Google OAuth detected. Avoid hardcoding credentials directly in connection strings as this creates security risks. Instead, use environment variables to store and access credentials at runtime. If you need the actual credential values to make this work properly, ask me to provide them through Replit's secret system.

This tag is missing an 'integrity' subresource integrity attribute. The 'integrity' attribute allows for the browser to verify that externally hosted files (for example from a CDN) are delivered without unexpected manipulation. Without this attribute, if an attacker can modify the externally hosted resource, this could lead to XSS and other types of attacks. To prevent this, include the base64-encoded cryptographic hash of the resource (file) you’re telling the browser to fetch in the 'integrity' attribute for all externally hosted files.

The application accepts potentially user-controlled input `{ bill, className = "", size = "default" }` which can control the location of the current window context. This can lead two types of vulnerabilities open-redirection and Cross-Site-Scripting (XSS) with JavaScript URIs. It is recommended to validate user-controllable input before allowing it to control the redirection.

The application accepts potentially user-controlled input `data` which can control the location of the current window context. This can lead two types of vulnerabilities open-redirection and Cross-Site-Scripting (XSS) with JavaScript URIs. It is recommended to validate user-controllable input before allowing it to control the redirection.

const emailContent = `

💰 Payment Request

MyBillPort

Payment Request

Amount: $${amount.toFixed(2)} CAD

Message: ${message}

Please send payment via Interac e-Transfer to: mybillportinfo@gmail.com

Instructions:

  1. Log into your online banking
  2. Send Interac e-Transfer
  3. To: mybillportinfo@gmail.com
  4. Amount: $${amount.toFixed(2)} CAD
  5. Security Question: What is this payment for?
  6. Answer: billboard

MyBillPort Payment Request

For support, contact us at: mybillportinfo@gmail.com

`;

const emailContent = `

✅ Profile Updated

MyBillPort Account Changes

Account Information Updated

Hi ${displayName || 'there'},

Your MyBillPort profile has been successfully updated with the following information:

Name: ${changes.name || 'Not provided'}

Email: ${changes.email || 'Not provided'}

Phone: ${changes.phone || 'Not provided'}

🔒 Security Notice: If you didn't make these changes, please contact us immediately at mybillportinfo@gmail.com

MyBillPort - Your Personal Finance Assistant

For any questions, contact us at: mybillportinfo@gmail.com

`;

The application processes user-input, this is passed to res.sendFile which can allow an attacker to arbitrarily read files on the system through path traversal. It is recommended to perform input validation in addition to canonicalizing the path. This allows you to validate the path against the intended directory it should be accessing.

M

Welcome to MyBillPort!

Your personal bill management assistant

Hi ${displayName}! 👋

Thank you for joining MyBillPort! We're excited to help you take control of your bills and never miss a payment again.

Here's what you can do:

  • 📋 Track all your recurring bills in one place
  • 🔔 Get email reminders before bills are due
  • 📊 See your bill overview at a glance
  • ✅ Mark bills as paid to stay organized
Start Managing Your Bills

If you have any questions, just reply to this email. We're here to help!

MyBillPort - Never miss a bill payment

mybillport.com

`)
